faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Montclair, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Montclair typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Montclair homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Montclair take 4-8 hours for a typical home. Heat treatments are often completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 10-14 days later to ensure complete elimination. We'll provide a specific timeline after inspecting your property.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products and methods that are safe when applied by our certified professionals. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying out for 4-6 hours. Heat treatments are chemical-free and you can return home immediately after the treatment is complete and the property has cooled down.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Montclair?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide a 90-day warranty on all bed bug treatments in Montclair. If bed bugs return within this period, we'll retreat your property at no additional charge. We also provide detailed prevention tips to help ensure long-term protection.
